Container.Name: xyOps
Container.Overview: xyOps is a complete workflow automation and server monitoring system. Schedule jobs, run event-driven workflows, monitor servers, and manage workers — all from a self-hosted web UI. Default login: admin / admin.
Container.Requires: The container hostname (set via ExtraParams --hostname) must be resolvable on your network by any worker servers connecting to xyOps. Change "xyops01" to a hostname that resolves to this Unraid server. Default credentials: admin / admin — change immediately after first login.

Config.Name: AppData / Data Directory
Config.Description: Persistent storage for all xyOps data including jobs, events, users, and configuration.

Config.Name: Docker Socket
Config.Description: Required: allows xyOps to launch and manage local Docker containers as job workers.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the xyOps web interface and conductor API. Access via http://[IP]:[PORT].

Config.Name: Worker / xySat Port
Config.Description: Port used by worker servers (xySat agents) to connect back to the xyOps conductor.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Set your local timezone for correct job scheduling. Examples: America/New_York, Europe/London, America/Chicago.

Config.Name: Enable Local xySat Worker
Config.Description: Set to true to run a built-in local worker (xySat) inside this container. Recommended for single-server setups. Set to false if using only external worker agents.

Config.Name: Admin Username
Config.Description: Username for the initial admin account. Change before first use if desired.

Config.Name: Admin Password
Config.Description: Password for the initial admin account. IMPORTANT: Change this immediately after first login.

Config.Name: Base API URL (Optional)
Config.Description: Override the API URL workers use to connect. Leave blank unless workers are on a different network or you are using a reverse proxy. Example: https://xyops.yourdomain.com
